name: codex-science
description: Codex-native science workflow orchestrator with life-sciences skills, Claude Science workflow parity references, MCP connector catalog, and research-to-execution routing.

interface.shortDescription: Claude Science-style research, literature, clinical, omics, biomodel, and compute workflows for Codex
interface.longDescription: Codex Science replicates the practical Claude Science workflow as a Codex-native orchestration skill package. It routes scientific requests across research ideation, literature evidence, PDF/document exploration, manuscript and figure work, indication dossiers, clinical protocols, single-cell analysis, nf-core pipelines, scvi-tools modeling, biomodel/remote-compute planning, and instrument data standardization, while documenting optional MCP connectors, workflow catalogs, credentials, and runtime boundaries.
defaultPrompt: Use Codex Science to evaluate this research idea
Use Codex Science to review this paper and extract the key evidence
Use Codex Science to plan an OMIX or single-cell analysis
Use Codex Science to choose a biomodel and compute path
Use Codex Science to draft a clinical study protocol
